chapter_title.ar: باب فِيمَنْ دَانَ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بِغَيْرِ إِمَامٍ مِنَ اللَّهِ جَلَّ جَلَالُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 86 – Regading the one who makes it a Religion of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic without an Imam<sup>asws</sup> from Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, Majestic is His<sup>azwj</sup> Majesty

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/218)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/218)
text: قَالَ اللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى لَأُعَذِّبَنَّ كُلَّ رَعِيَّةٍ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ دَانَتْ بِوَلَايَةِ كُلِّ إِمَامٍ جَائِرٍ لَيْسَ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَ إِنْ كَانَتِ الرَّعِيَّةُ فِي أَعْمَالِهَا بَرَّةً تَقِيَّةً وَ لَأَعْفُوَنَّ عَنْ كُلِّ رَعِيَّةٍ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ دَانَتْ بِوَلَايَةِ كُلِّ إِمَامٍ عَادِلٍ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَ إِنْ كَانَتِ الرَّعِيَّةُ فِي أَنْفُسِهَا ظَالِمَةً مُسِيئَةً .

en.hubeali: And from him, from Hisham Bin Salim, from Habeeb Al Sijistany,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High Said: “I<sup>azwj</sup> shall Punish every citizen in Al-Islam who makes it a Religion with the guardianship of every tyrannous imam (leader) who isn’t from Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and even if the citizen was righteous in his deeds, pious; and I<sup>azwj</sup> shall Forgive every citizen in Al-Islam who makes it a Religion by the Wilayah of every Just Imam<sup>asws</sup> from Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and even if the citizen was unjust within himself, a sinner’.
en.sarwar: 4. He has narrated from Hisham ibn Salim from Habib al-Sajistani from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. “Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, has said, ’I will cause to suffer punishment all those who live a religious life in Islam under the guardianship of unjust Imams who possesses no authority from Allah even though such followers would be virtuous and pious in their deeds. I will forgive all those who live a religious life in Islamunder the guardianship of an Imam who is just in his dealings and possess authority from Allah even though such followers in their dealings would be unjust sinners.”
